'''''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 15''' was published in December [[1978]] by [[Paradise Press]].

This was the last issue to be edited by [[Jon Trux]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"'[[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|Empire]]' Latest!", by [[John May]]: a preview of ''The Empire Strikes Back''. Interestingly, this article refers to ''The Empire Strikes Back'' as "the second of [[George Lucas]]'s [[Sequel trilogy|twelve-story cycle]]" rather than the fifth of a six-film series.
*"Bleep-Bleep!—[[Wikipedia:SETI|The Search For Extra-Terrestrial Intelligence]]," by [[Michael Marten|Dr. M. F. Marten]]: an article on the real search for extra-terrestrial life.
*"Orbiter 102—First Space Freighter", by Jon Trux: a profile of the soon to be launched [[Wikipedia: Space Shuttle Columbia|Space Shuttle ''Columbia'']], then simply designated OV-102 by [[Wikipedia:NASA|NASA]].
